snippet.title: Кого слушаете вы?
snippet.description:
Радиоприёмник называется всеволновым, потому что он способен принимать сигналы во всех основных радиовещательных диапазонах. Однако он способен принимать далеко не все частоты.

Это приёмник ещё ранней ревизии - тогда эта модель только начала выпускаться. Я удивился, когда увидел, сколько такие сейчас стоят на Алиэкспрессе.

Если хотите приобрести этот приёмник - 10 000₽ и он Ваш.

В комплекте есть длинная антенна из провода, но я ею никогда не пользовался.
Делал для этого приёмника много самодельных антенн, одну из которых можно будет увидеть в следующем коротком видео.

На все вопросы отвечу в комментариях.

snippet.title: Антенна для перехвата радиопереговоров
snippet.description:
Если хотите приобрести этот приёмник - 10 000₽ и он Ваш.

Катушка антенного контура создаёт колебательный контур вместе с конденсатором и определяет резонансную частоту антенны. Индуктивность этой катушки и её расположение на ферритовом стержне влияют на избирательность и чувствительность антенны в определённом диапазоне. 

Катушка связи служит для передачи сигнала с антенного контура на вход приёмника.

Для лучшей добротности катушки стоит намотать лицендратом. Расположение катушек на феррите также сказывается на приёме. Можно перемещать их относительно друг друга, добиваясь наилучшего приёма. Ну и конечно феррит чем больше, тем лучше.

Ёмкость конденсатора в районе 20-40 пФ. У меня конденсатор на 125 пФ и регулировка довольно грубая. В идеале можно поставить подстроечный конденсатор и постоянный, чтобы диапазон регулировки был 20-40 пФ.

🚗 DL Scanner & Smart Safety Device Project 🪪🔒

Is video me maine ek Smart DL Scanner System banaya hai jo driving ko aur bhi safe aur intelligent banata hai 💡

🔹 DL (Driving License) RFID Scanner 🪪

🔹 Alcohol Detection Sensor 🍺❌
🔹 GPS + GSM Module (Location tracking) 📡
🔹 Buzzer Alert System 🔊
🔹 DC Motor Control (Vehicle ON/OFF) ⚙️
🔹 LCD Display (Information show karta hai) 📟

⚡ Kaise kaam karta hai?
Jab DL scan hota hai tabhi vehicle ON hota hai 🚘
Agar driver ki aankh band hoti hai ya alcohol detect hota hai, to buzzer bajta hai aur vehicle automatically OFF ho jata hai ❗
Saath hi location bhi track ho sakti hai 📍

🎯 Is project ka main aim hai:
Road accidents ko kam karna aur safe driving ko promote karna 🚦

snippet.title: The FCC Goes After Ham Operator, Ham Radio Now Certified & Amateur Radio Satellite Is Back Online
snippet.description:
00:00 Certified Fresh Ham
00:47 It's Alive!
01:45 Busted By The FCC
03:23 FCC Roundup 
04:22 Retevis RB48 Pro Roger Beep

The state of Tennessee has added the FCC Part 97 Amateur Radio Technician Class license as a Tier 1 recognized credential on its Statewide Industry Credential List. As reported by the ICQ Podcast, the new approval will give K-12 students across Tennessee access to high-value, hands-on learning in communications technology.  Tennessee High School teacher Justin McClain, callsign KQ4ANJ, expressed excitement about the next steps which include getting students licensed, on the air, and discovering the many benefits and real-world applications of amateur radio. 

The Fuji-OSCAR 29 satellite, also known as FO-29, was launched by Japan in August 1996. and is now approaching its 30th year in orbit.  The satellite, which has long operated only when its solar panels are illuminated because its batteries failed years ago, has now entered a full-sunlight orbit season allowing the transponder to remain active continuously as long as sunlight reaches its solar panels. Amateur radio operators around the globe are giddy with excitement, reporting renewed activity on the satellite’s transponder, with successful SSB and CW contacts logged from Japan, China, and elsewhere, as well as its Telemetry data and its CW beacon. 
Licensed amateur radio operators are encouraged to monitor the passes, make contacts, and report activity on the AMSAT OSCAR status page.

The FCC has sent a mean letter to a Pennsylvania amateur radio operator for causing harmful interference to emergency 911 communications services. In a notice dated March 25, the FCC Enforcement Bureau informed Mr David O. Knudtson, callsign KD3ASC, that his BTech UV-Pro handheld radio had been retransmitting Allegheny County’s public safety channel on 470.4375 MHz.  FCC Agents used direction finding techniques to track the errant signal to his residence after an interference complaint from the county emergency services was filed with the FCC in July of last year. FCC agents determined that Mr. Knudtson had activated the “Audio Relay” feature of his BTech radio, turning it into a simplex repeater that was rebroadcasting the 911 traffic. The FCC determined that Knudtson, a licensed Technician class amateur radio operator was operating outside of his authorized amateur frequency bands in violation of FCC rules, including willful interference with public safety communications.  The mean letter serves as a warning from the FCC stating that further violations could possibly result in another mean letter and Mr. Knudtson must respond in writing within 10 days, describing the steps he is taking to prevent this from happening again.

and now for the FCC enforcement roundup. Here is the breakdown of what the FCC got up to in the month of March, 2026.
The FCC sent two violation letters to commercial radio stations.
They issued 10 orders, consent decrees, proposals or court filings, regarding various ongoing proceedings not related to radio-dorks.
They removed 7 fraudsters from participating in the federal E-Rate Telecommunications and Information Services Program for schools and libraries.
As reported only moments ago, they sent a scary Letter to a man in Pittsburgh for interfering with his local emergency services communications system, the only action of this type for the entire month.
And the part that you've all been waiting for, the grand total of fines and jail sentences imposed by the FCC for CB radio, amateur radio and GMRS radio users was ZERO.
Join me again next week.. or sooner, when I may, or may not, do this again. Good night, and have a pleasant tomorrow. [Roger Beep!]

snippet.title: This Horizon Portable HF Antenna Might Change Your POTA Game
snippet.description:
In this video, I take a deep dive into the Horizon Antennas UltraLite Shooting Star Package, a lightweight and portable HF antenna system perfect for POTA (Parks on the Air), field ops, and portable ham radio setups. I head out to my local park to walk through the full antenna setup process, show how quickly it can be deployed in the field, and share my real-world experience using it on location.
I also cover the key features of the Horizon UltraLite Shooting Star antenna, including its compact design, ease of use, and suitability for portable operators looking for a reliable HF antenna solution. To round things out, I hook it up to my radio and perform an SWR test, giving you a clear look at its performance and tuning right out of the bag.
If you're into ham radio, portable operations, POTA activations, QRP setups, or lightweight antenna systems, this review will give you a solid idea of what to expect from this antenna in real-world conditions.

snippet.title: £200 Ham Radio Challenge: SOTA + POTA in One Day
snippet.description:
Can you actually get on the air for SOTA and POTA without spending a fortune?

In this video, I attempt my first ever Summits on the Air activation while also trying to complete a Parks on the Air activation — all in the same day, and with a total setup costing under £200.
I headed out to Wendover Woods (G/CE-005 // GB-1850) with a simple, budget-friendly setup to see what’s possible with low power and minimal gear.
The SOTA activation was carried out on 2m using just 5W and a HB9CV antenna… while the POTA attempt on 20m used a tiny QRP HF setup putting out just 2.5W.

It didn’t all go perfectly — but that’s kind of the point. This video is all about showing that you don’t need expensive gear to get out, experiment, and enjoy amateur radio.

🎙️ Radio: Baofeng UV-5R (SOTA) / uSDX QRP HF Radio (POTA)
📡 Power: 5W (2m) / 2.5W (20m)
🪫 Setup: HB9CV antenna (2m) / Telescopic HF antenna (20m)
📍 Location: Wendover Woods (G/CE-05 / GB-1850)

👉 Subscribe for more approachable amateur radio adventures!

Website: RADIOFORUS.CO.UK
Email: Tom@radioforus.co.uk
Discord: https://discord.gg/nNdkVhvTyR

snippet.title: 今一番好きな #アマチュア無線 の #移動運用 スタイル #amateurradio #hamradio #CW #電信 #モールス #無線  #ハイエース #pota #木曽三川公園  #アウトドア
snippet.description:
3月も終わりに近付き少しずつですが春めいてきました🌸
色んなスタイルでアマチュア無線を運用します。その中で最近は移動運用もparks on the air（POTA）というアマチュア無線で楽しむゲームを絡めて遊んでます👍
私が一番好きな移動運用のスタイルは青空の下で思う存分アウトドア気分を満喫しながらアマチュア無線を楽しむ事ですね😅
日本での真夏、真冬は外で楽しむ事が難しいので自動車のエンジンを掛けて空調を効かせた車内でアマチュア無線を楽しむ事になりますが、これはコレでオッケーで好きなんですが😅
やはりエンジン掛けずに自然を感じてエコ運用で遊ぶのが一番気持ち良いですね〜
外で楽しく遊べる春と秋は良い季節ですね🙆
#parksontheair #アマチュア無線 #amateurradio #hamradio #CW #電信 #モールス #無線 #CQ #移動運用 #ハイエース #電波 #愛西市 #木曽三川公園 #アウトドア #ダブルバズーカー #東海広場

snippet.title: Could paying for perfect test scores change Amateur Radio forever?
snippet.description:
Amateur radio is often seen as an expensive hobby dominated by pricey equipment, but Chris Boden challenges that narrative by focusing on accessibility and experimentation. He believes the barrier to entry shouldn't be financial. His unique proposal—offering to cover the exam fees for any student who achieves a perfect score on their technician license test—highlights a creative approach to mentorship. Rather than gatekeeping, this mindset emphasizes community building and incentivizing excellence in the next generation of radio operators. It raises a compelling question about how the amateur radio community can better support newcomers and whether grassroots initiatives like this might be the spark needed to revitalize interest in the craft.
#AmateurRadio #HamRadio #HamShackTV #RadioOperators #STEMEducation #Mentorship #RadioHobbies #TechLicense

snippet.title: Rep. Gill Grills USPS Postmaster on Driver Licenses—Gig Workers the Concern
snippet.description:
At a House Oversight hearing, Rep. Gill questioned Postmaster General David Steiner of the U.S. Postal Service about whether carriers are required to hold commercial driver’s licenses and are operating within the law. Steiner confirmed they are, while pointing to gig workers as the primary concern in the debate. Watch the exchange here.

snippet.description:
Krishna Krishna Bhajan | Radhe Krishna Song | Bhakti Song 2025 | Shri Krishna Devotional Video


🙏 जय श्री कृष्ण 🙏
स्वागत है आपका हमारे भक्ति परिवार में।
इस वीडियो में सुनिए एक मधुर भजन,
जो आपके मन को शांति, भक्ति और आनंद से भर देगा।
हमारा उद्देश्य है कि हर दिल में “राधे कृष्ण” नाम का दीप जले और घर-घर में भक्ति की गूंज सुनाई दे।

—
🎶 कृष्ण भजन का महत्व
श्रीकृष्ण करुणा, प्रेम और धर्म के प्रतीक हैं।
उनके भजन सुनने या गाने से —
मन शांत होता है 🕊️
आत्मा प्रसन्न होती है 🌸
जीवन में सकारात्मकता आती है ✨
और हृदय में प्रेम बढ़ता है 💖

—
🕉️ हरे कृष्ण महामंत्र
“हरे कृष्ण हरे कृष्ण, कृष्ण कृष्ण हरे हरे।
हरे राम हरे राम, राम राम हरे हरे।”
इस मंत्र के जाप से मन स्थिर होता है और आत्मा को दिव्यता का अनुभव मिलता है।
यह मंत्र हमें ईश्वर से जोड़ने का सबसे सरल मार्ग है।

—
🌺 कृष्ण की लीलाएं
बालपन की माखन चोरी से लेकर
कुरुक्षेत्र में गीता का उपदेश देने तक —
कृष्ण की हर लीला हमें सिखाती है कि
भक्ति में ही सच्ची शक्ति छिपी है।

—
🌸 हमारे भजन संग्रह
👉 Krishna Bhajan
👉 Radhe Krishna Song
👉 Govinda Naam Sankirtan
👉 Bhakti Geet
👉 Hare Krishna Mantra
हर भजन आपको श्रीकृष्ण के प्रेम में डुबो देता है और मन को शांत करता है।

—
🌼 भक्ति का मार्ग
भक्ति वह सरल मार्ग है जो जीवन भगवान की ओर ले जाता है।
जब हम सच्चे मन से कृष्ण का नाम लेते हैं,
तो दुख दूर होकर जीवन में नई रोशनी आती है।

—
✨ हमारा उद्देश्य
हम चाहते हैं कि हर घर में “हरे कृष्ण” का नाम गूंजे।
अगर आपको ये वीडियो पसंद आए तो —
✔️ चैनल को Subscribe करें
✔️ वीडियो को Like करें
✔️ अपने मित्रों और परिवार के साथ Share करें 🙏

—
राधे कृष्ण… जय श्री कृष्ण… हरि कृष्ण… 🌸

#HinduDevotion

snippet.title: Requisitos para cazar en Republica Dominicana con Rifles de Aire (PCP). #shorts #short #shortvideo
snippet.description:
En este video, Emmanuel Sánchez, CEO de Armería JR, explica claramente si es legal cazar algunas aves en la República Dominicana utilizando rifles de aire tipo PCP.

⚠️ OJO: No basta con tener el rifle. Es imprescindible contar con el permiso oficial del Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales.

📋 ¿Qué pide Medio Ambiente para otorgar el permiso de caza?
✔️ Copia de cédula de identidad
✔️ Solicitud formal de permiso
✔️ Pago de la tasa correspondiente
✔️ Especificar especie autorizada y temporada de caza
✔️ Cumplir con las vedas establecidas
✔️ En algunos casos, licencia o carnet de cazador

La autorización depende de la especie, la temporada y las regulaciones vigentes. Cazar sin permiso puede conllevar multas y sanciones legales.

snippet.title: Mobile HF Radio Install in My Toyota 4Runner | Comet Antenna Setup (VHF/UHF + HF)
snippet.description:
In this video, I’m upgrading my mobile radio setup using gear I received from 12 Volt Power, the sole distributor of Comet products across North and South America, and walking through how I turned my vehicle into a more capable HF + VHF/UHF station. 📡

This is a hands-on install, from mounting antennas to figuring out cable routing (and yes… fixing a questionable decision 😅). I walk through how I’m setting up both my VHF/UHF and HF antennas and what this setup looks like.

snippet.title: 5 Low-Cost Tools to Get Started In Signals Intelligence
snippet.description:
Signals Intelligence is much more than listening in on enemy communications. In this video we learn what SIGINT is, some of the basic tools needed to get started, and demonstrate how they can be used to map the RF landscape around you. Fifth-generational warfare's primary battle domain is in the information space, so for prepared citizens to be relevant in today's warfare, we must become competent in this domain. 

Gear: *NOT SPONSORED*
RTL-SDR: https://www.rtl-sdr.com/ 
Android adapter cable: https://www.amazon.com/Adapter-Android-Female-Samsung-Galaxy/dp/B0F8BH19V2/ref=sr_1_1?nsdOptOutParam=true&s=electronics&sr=1-1
Sologood drone feed monitor: https://sologood.net/products/sologood-800-480-5-8g-fpv-monitor-with-dvr-40ch-4-3-inch-lcd-display-16-9-ntsc-pal-auto-search-video-recording
TinySA Ultra: https://www.amazon.com/Upgraded-TinySA-Spectrum-Frequency-Generator/dp/B0BBGK9QJB/ref=sr_1_2_sspa?s=industrial&sr=1-2-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY
Homemade Yagi (+ RDF demo): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VBGWhSGmqAw 
KrakenSDR (not featured in this vid): https://www.krakenrf.com/

Apps and Software:
BLE Radar: https://f-droid.org/en/packages/f.cking.software/
RTL-SDR Driver: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=marto.rtl_tcp_andro&pli=1
ADS-B Radar: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=me.jajae.adsbradar
SDR#: https://airspy.com/download/

NTIA Spectrum Chart: https://www.ntia.gov/page/united-states-frequency-allocation-chart
SIGID Wiki: https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Signal_Identification_Guide 

Disclaimer:
These videos are for education and are meant to inspire and motivate. I will never promote commercial content, and if a product appears in any video it should be in no way construed as endorsement of the product. Also, some of the topics may be sensitive (e.g. militias.) Don't do anything illegal. Check with your local laws.
NO generative A.I. is used in the production of content on this channel. 

If you wish to support my work, check out my Patreon. 100% of the proceeds will be funneled back into channel content! 
Patreon link: https://www.patreon.com/CivilDefenseEngineer

snippet.title: MURS Radio Explained – No License Required! (Better Than GMRS?)
snippet.description:
Did you know there’s a completely license-free radio service in the U.S. that allows external antennas and offers solid range?

In this video, I break down the MURS (Multi-Use Radio Service) and explain how it compares to GMRS, CB radio, and 2-meter band.

If you’re looking for a simple, reliable way to communicate with family—without licenses or complicated setup—this might be exactly what you need.

📡 WHAT YOU’LL LEARN
What MURS is and how it works
Why it operates in the 151–154 MHz VHF band
The 5 MURS channels and frequencies
Why VHF can outperform UHF in rural areas
Key differences between:
MURS vs GMRS
MURS vs CB
MURS vs 2-meter amateur radio
Real-world use cases (hiking, family comms, backup communication)
Limitations you NEED to know
👍 WHY MURS IS INTERESTING
✅ No license required
✅ External antennas allowed
✅ Simple “set it and go” operation
❌ No repeaters
❌ Limited to 2 watts
❌ Only 5 channels
🛒 MURS RADIOS (AFFILIATE LINKS)

Check out some affordable MURS radios here:
👉  Radioddity MU-5 MURS Radio    https://amzn.to/480c9hc

As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases. This helps support the channel at no extra cost to you.

snippet.title: Texas Pesticide Applicator General Exam 2026: Master Your TDA License Test Fast
snippet.description:
Texas Pesticide Applicator General Exam 2026: Master Your TDA License Test Fast

Are you prepared to conquer the Texas Pesticide Applicator General Exam and secure your professional future? This comprehensive 2026 study guide breaks down the essential concepts, regulations, and safety protocols you need to master the TDA General Standards test without the stress of retakes.

Navigating the Texas Department of Agriculture (TDA) certification process can be daunting, but understanding the core principles of pesticide application is the key to career success. This video is meticulously designed to mirror the latest 2026 exam format, focusing on the General Standards that every commercial, non-commercial, and technician applicant in the Lone Star State must know. We dive deep into the most challenging sections of the exam, including state and federal pesticide laws, environmental safety, and the intricacies of Integrated Pest Management (IPM). 

Throughout this intensive walkthrough, we provide a detailed breakdown of how to read complex pesticide labels, identify signal words, and strictly adhere to precautionary statements. You will learn the science of pesticide movement in the environment—focusing on preventing drift, leaching, and runoff to protect Texas groundwater. We also tackle the technical side of the profession, such as equipment calibration and the specific math formulas required for accurate mixing and loading. By the end of this session, you will have a clear, actionable strategy for answering the TDA's most common multiple-choice questions. Whether you are entering the industry for the first time or are an experienced professional preparing for renewal, this video acts as your ultimate study partner. We simplify dense technical jargon into digestible insights, using high-retention memory aids to ensure the information sticks long after you leave the testing center. Join the thousands of successful Texas professionals who have used our targeted exam prep to streamline their licensing journey and advance their careers in agriculture, landscaping, and structural pest control.

In this deep-dive exam preparation session, we cover:
* **TDA Licensing Framework:** Understanding the differences between Commercial, Non-Commercial, and Private licenses.
* **Federal vs. State Regulations:** Key takeaways from FIFRA and the Texas Pesticide Control Act.
* **Label Mastery:** How to quickly locate PPE requirements, reentry intervals, and first aid instructions.
* **Integrated Pest Management (IPM):** Implementation of cultural, mechanical, and biological controls.
* **Environmental Stewardship:** Strategies for protecting non-target organisms and sensitive habitats.
* **Human Health & Safety:** Recognizing signs of acute vs. chronic toxicity and managing exposure.
* **Application Equipment:** Proper selection of nozzles and sprayers for maximum efficiency.
* **Math & Calibration:** Step-by-step walkthroughs for area, volume, and rate calculations.
* **Emergency Response:** Professional protocols for handling spills, fires, and transportation accidents.
* **Record Keeping:** Compliance requirements for maintaining legal pesticide application logs.

Our channel is dedicated to providing high-quality, up-to-date study resources for professional licensing and certification exams. We specialize in creating high-converting educational content that simplifies complex regulations into actionable knowledge for students and industry professionals alike. Our mission is to help you pass your exams on the first attempt by providing the most accurate practice tests and expert insights across the agricultural, healthcare, and trade sectors.

If you found this walkthrough helpful, please give it a thumbs up and subscribe to our channel for more 2026 exam prep content. Have questions about a specific TDA regulation or a tricky practice question? Drop a comment below—we love hearing from our community and answering your licensing questions. Don't forget to hit the notification bell so you never miss a new practice test or industry update!

'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham.
